'''âzh-b-b''' ('''kazhabab''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quarantine|quarantine]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quarantine|quarantine]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âzh-b-b
|-
! Lemma
| kazhabab
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhabab|thizhabab]] || [[word:jizhabab|jizhabab]] || [[word:shizhabab|shizhabab]] || [[word:kizhabab|kizhabab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhabab|thuthuzhabab]] || [[word:jujuzhabab|jujuzhabab]] || [[word:shushuzhabab|shushuzhabab]] || [[word:kukuzhabab|kukuzhabab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhabab|thuzhabab]] || [[word:juzhabab|juzhabab]] || [[word:shuzhabab|shuzhabab]] || [[word:kuzhabab|kuzhabab]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhabab|thuzhabab]] || [[word:juzhabab|juzhabab]] || [[word:shuzhabab|shuzhabab]] || [[word:kuzhabab|kuzhabab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhabab|thezhabab]] || [[word:jezhabab|jezhabab]] || [[word:shezhabab|shezhabab]] || [[word:kezhabab|kezhabab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhabab|thothozhabab]] || [[word:jojozhabab|jojozhabab]] || [[word:shoshozhabab|shoshozhabab]] || [[word:kokozhabab|kokozhabab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhabab|thozhabab]] || [[word:jozhabab|jozhabab]] || [[word:shozhabab|shozhabab]] || [[word:kozhabab|kozhabab]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhabab|thozhabab]] || [[word:jozhabab|jozhabab]] || [[word:shozhabab|shozhabab]] || [[word:kozhabab|kozhabab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠzhabab|thĂŠzhabab]] || [[word:jĂŠzhabab|jĂŠzhabab]] || [[word:shĂŠzhabab|shĂŠzhabab]] || [[word:kĂŠzhabab|kĂŠzhabab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhabab|thathazhabab]] || [[word:jajazhabab|jajazhabab]] || [[word:shashazhabab|shashazhabab]] || [[word:kakazhabab|kakazhabab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhabab|thazhabab]] || [[word:jazhabab|jazhabab]] || [[word:shazhabab|shazhabab]] || [[word:kazhabab|kazhabab]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhabab|thazhabab]] || [[word:jazhabab|jazhabab]] || [[word:shazhabab|shazhabab]] || [[word:kazhabab|kazhabab]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhabab|shazhabab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhabab|goshazhabab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhabab|gokishazhabab]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhababnĂŒ|shazhababnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhababnknĂŒ|goshazhababnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhababnĂŒ|gokishazhababnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhababshĂ«|shazhababshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhababnkshĂ«|goshazhababnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhababshĂ«|gokishazhababshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhababro|shazhababro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhababnkro|goshazhababnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhababro|gokishazhababro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhababmu|shazhababmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhababnkmu|goshazhababnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhababmu|gokishazhababmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhababsher|shazhababsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhababnksher|goshazhababnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhababsher|gokishazhababsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhababng|shazhababng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhababnkng|goshazhababnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhababng|gokishazhababng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhababya|shazhababya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhababnkya|goshazhababnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhababya|gokishazhababya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhababyam|shazhababyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhababnkyam|goshazhababnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhababyam|gokishazhababyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhababnĂŒshĂ«|shazhababnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhababnknĂŒshĂ«|goshazhababnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhababnĂŒshĂ«|gokishazhababnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhababnĂŒro|shazhababnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhababnknĂŒro|goshazhababnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhababnĂŒro|gokishazhababnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhababnĂŒmu|shazhababnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhababnknĂŒmu|goshazhababnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhababnĂŒmu|gokishazhababnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhababshĂ«nĂŒ|shazhababshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhababnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshazhababnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhababshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishazhababshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhababshĂ«ro|shazhababshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhababnkshĂ«ro|goshazhababnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhababshĂ«ro|gokishazhababshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhababshĂ«mu|shazhababshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhababnkshĂ«mu|goshazhababnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhababshĂ«mu|gokishazhababshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhababronĂŒ|shazhababronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhababnkronĂŒ|goshazhababnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhababronĂŒ|gokishazhababronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhababroshĂ«|shazhababroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhababnkroshĂ«|goshazhababnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhababroshĂ«|gokishazhababroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhababromu|shazhababromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhababnkromu|goshazhababnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhababromu|gokishazhababromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhababmunĂŒ|shazhababmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhababnkmunĂŒ|goshazhababnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhababmunĂŒ|gokishazhababmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhababmushĂ«|shazhababmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhababnkmushĂ«|goshazhababnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhababmushĂ«|gokishazhababmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhababmuro|shazhababmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhababnkmuro|goshazhababnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhababmuro|gokishazhababmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
